name: BEN_BILL_CHARGES_
description: BEN_BILL_CHARGE contains information related to Master charge record for each month and Stores summary amounts.

columns.Name: BILL_CHARGE_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: This column indicates the Foreign Key to PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.

columns.Name: BILLING_DATE
columns.Comments: This column indicates the bill generation date.

columns.Name: HOLD_BILL_FLAG
columns.Comments: This column indicates that hold bill flag is set Y or N.

columns.Name: TOTAL_BILL_AMT
columns.Comments: This column indicates the total outstanding bill amount which is the summation of CURRENT_BILL_AMT, PAST_AMT_DUE, OTHER_AMT_DUE.

columns.Name: BILL_YEAR
columns.Comments: This column indicates the year of bill generation which flows from BEN_BILL_CALENDAR.

columns.Name: BILL_PERIOD
columns.Comments: This column indicates the billing period which flows from BEN_BILL_CALENDAR.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: This column indicates the billing status for which the possible values are Open, Unpaid, Partially-paid, and Fully-paid.

columns.Name: BILL_CAL_ID
columns.Comments: This column indicates the Foreign Key to BEN_BILL_CALENDAR.

columns.Name: BILL_SOURCE
columns.Comments: This column determines if bill was generated manually or by batch process.

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: This column indicates the comments which flows from BEN_BILL_CALENDAR.

columns.Name: BILL_GENERATED
columns.Comments: This column indicates that the bill is generated or not. It holds Y or N as value.

columns.Name: BILL_GENERATED_DATE
columns.Comments: This column indicates the date on which bill was generated.

columns.Name: PAST_AMT_DUE
columns.Comments: This column holds past due amount. From prior yet Unpaid, Partially-paid bill details / line items.

columns.Name: BILL_NUM
columns.Comments: This column indicates the Generated ID, could be PK as well.

columns.Name: BILL_REASON
columns.Comments: This column is created for Future use.

columns.Name: OTHER_AMT_DUE
columns.Comments: This column holds amount values from conversion.

columns.Name: CURRENCY_CODE
columns.Comments: This column indicates currency code as on program or plan.

columns.Name: PER_ACCT_NUM
columns.Comments: This column indicates the Foreign Key to PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.

columns.Name: CURRENT_BILL_AMT
columns.Comments: This column indicates the holds bill for current period.

columns.Name: TOTAL_TAX_AMT
columns.Comments: This column indicates total tax amount. This column is created for Future use.

columns.Name: PER_BILL_INFO_ID
columns.Comments: This column indicates the Foreign Key to BEN_PER_BILL_INFO_F.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.
